Adi Stock

Inventory Management · Supply Chain & Logistics

Advanced Stock and Inventory Management Software

Technologies

PHPLaravelVue.jsMySQLREST APIBarcode/QR ScannerIoT Integration

Key Features

  • ✓ Real-time stock tracking and monitoring
  • ✓ Advanced barcode and QR code scanning
  • ✓ Automated purchase and sales orders
  • ✓ Comprehensive supplier and customer management
  • ✓ Smart stock alerts and notifications
  • ✓ Detailed inventory reports and analytics
  • ✓ Multi-location warehouse support
  • ✓ Demand forecasting

Project Details

Category
Inventory Management
Industry
Supply Chain & Logistics
Target Audience
Retailers, Wholesalers, Manufacturers, E-commerce businesses
Pricing Model
Per location/month + Setup fee
Price Range
$49-199/location/month
Development Time
4-6 months
Team Size
4-5 developers
Market Size
$2.38 billion (2025) → $8.48 billion (2035)

Unique Selling Points

AI-powered demand forecastingIoT sensor integrationAdvanced analytics
